specific_question: How has opening a new supermarket in Vaughan, Ontario helped increase sales in other stores in Toronto?
answer: Before opening the new store in Vaughan in 2025, most customers used the delivery option for their shopping needs. The opening of the Vaughan supermarket has freed up the delivery personnel to fulfill more orders in the main Toronto area faster and more efficiently, which has increased the sales there by about 1.2%.
